First things first

What is SEO, really?

Think of Google as the world's largest shopping mall. Every day, thousands of customers walk in searching for a business like yours. SEO puts your store at the front entrance — page one — instead of a back corridor on page five, where almost nobody looks.

Page 1 of Google
92%
of all clicks happen here
This is where your customers are. This is where SEO gets you.
Page 5 of Google
<1%
of clicks ever reach it
If your website lives here, it's invisible — no matter how good your business is.
How a search becomes revenue
Search a customer looks
→
Google picks the best
→
Your Website page one
→
Visitor they click
→
Lead they call or email
→
Customer they buy
→
Revenue every month
Behind the scenes

How Google finds your business

No tricks, no magic. Five simple steps happen every time someone searches.

Step 1
Someone searches
A customer types what they need — "roof repair near me".
Step 2
Google compares
In under a second, Google weighs millions of websites.
Step 3
Google picks the best
The clearest, fastest, most trusted sites win page one.
Step 4
SEO makes you one of them
That's our job: making Google confident in your website.
Step 5
The customer visits you
They click, they browse, they call. You get the business.
Sound familiar?

Why most business websites don't bring in customers

✕
Nobody finds your website
You're not on page one, so customers never see you.
✕
Competitors rank above you
They show up first and take the call that should be yours.
✕
Low Google visibility
Your site appears for almost none of the searches that matter.
✕
Little traffic
A website without visitors is a brochure nobody opens.
✕
No local presence
You're missing from the map results where locals actually look.
✕
Poor optimization
Google can't tell what you do — so it doesn't recommend you.
✕
Slow website
Visitors leave in seconds. Google notices, and ranks you lower.
✕
Weak content
Thin pages don't answer questions, so they don't earn rankings.
✕
No keyword strategy
You're invisible for the exact words customers search.
We solve all of these. That's the job.

Every problem above has a known fix. Our SEO plans work through them one by one — and you see the progress in a monthly report.

What you get

What SEO does for your business

SEO isn't about rankings for their own sake. It's about what rankings turn into.

More website visitors
Show up where customers already search — every day.
Higher Google rankings
Climb toward the top 3 spots that get most of the clicks.
More phone calls
Local searches turn into ringing phones and booked jobs.
More leads
Turn searches into form fills, quotes, and appointments.
More sales
Visitors arrive already looking to buy what you sell.
Better brand trust
Ranking high signals "established and reliable" to buyers.
Lower marketing cost
Organic clicks are free — no bidding, no per-click fees.
Long-term growth
Every month of SEO builds on the last. It compounds.
24/7 lead generation
Your rankings work nights, weekends, and holidays.
A fair comparison

SEO vs. Google Ads

Both bring traffic. The difference is what happens over time.

SEOLong-term asset
✓Long-term: rankings keep working month after month
✓Organic traffic — you don't pay per click
✓Higher trust: buyers skip ads and click real results
✓Compounds over time, so cost per lead keeps dropping
Google AdsRented traffic
•Immediate traffic — great for quick tests and promos
•You pay for every single click
•Traffic stops the moment your budget stops
•Cost per click rises as competitors bid against you
Return over 24 months
SEO (compounds) Ads (flat, stops with budget)

Smart businesses often use both. But SEO is the one that keeps working after you stop paying for clicks — every month of work adds to the last.

Step by step

Our SEO process

The same proven sequence for every client — human strategy, accelerated by AI tools at every step. You always know what we're working on and why.

01
Website Audit
We check everything Google checks and find what's holding you back.
02
Competitor Research
We study who outranks you and exactly why.
03
Keyword Research
We find the searches your customers actually type.
04
Technical SEO
We fix speed, errors, and structure so Google can trust your site.
05
On-Page SEO
Every page gets clear titles, headings, and descriptions.
06
Content Optimization
We make your pages answer real customer questions.
07
Link Building
Reputable sites linking to you = votes of confidence.
08
Reporting
A plain-English monthly report: rankings, traffic, leads.

Platform expertise

We speak your website's language

Every platform has its own quirks. We optimize each one the right way.

SHShopify SEO
Collection-page structure, duplicate-content fixes, and product schema that gets your listings into Google Shopping results.
BCBigCommerce SEO
Faceted-navigation cleanup and category optimization so thousands of product pages don't compete with each other.
WPWordPress SEO
Plugin tuning, theme speed fixes, and content structure — WordPress can be blazing fast when it's set up right.
WCWooCommerce SEO
Product and checkout optimization that keeps WordPress flexibility without the usual store slowdowns.
MGMagento SEO
Enterprise catalog SEO: layered navigation, index management, and speed work for large product sets.
CWCustom Websites
Hand-built site? We work directly with your developers — or handle the technical changes ourselves.

Good questions

Frequently asked questions

Most businesses see meaningful movement in 3–4 months and strong results by month 6–9. SEO is a long game — but unlike ads, the results stick around and keep growing after the work is done.
Our plans start at $749/month and scale with how competitive your market is. On your free call we'll tell you honestly which plan fits — and if SEO isn't a good investment for you right now, we'll say that too.
No — and you should run from anyone who does. Nobody controls Google. What we do guarantee: transparent work, honest reporting, and strategies that have worked for 500+ websites.
Ads put you at the top instantly, but you pay for every click and traffic stops when your budget does. SEO earns your spot — it takes longer, but the traffic is free and compounds over time. Many clients use both.
Usually not. Most websites just need optimization, not replacement. Your free audit will tell you either way — no pressure in either direction.
Yes. Plain-English monthly reports, a real human account manager, and a monthly call where you can ask anything. If you ever don't understand something, that's our failure, not yours.
No. All plans are month to month. We keep clients by getting results, not by locking them in.
You're not alone — it's the most common story we hear. Ask us anything on the free call, request references, and watch your first month's report. You'll see the difference quickly.
Yes — people now find businesses through ChatGPT and Google’s AI answers, not just the classic ten blue links. We optimize your website for both: traditional rankings and AI search results. We also use AI tools ourselves to work faster, with every strategy decision made by an experienced human.
